content:
The user wants me to extract the content of the provided image into a JSON format. **Image Analysis:** The image is a data sheet page for a Texas Instruments component, specifically the TPS562200 and TPS563200. It contains: 1. **Header:** Texas Instruments logo, part numbers, and document revision information. 2. **Section 6.5:** Electrical Characteristics. 3. **Condition:** $T_J = -40^{\circ}C$ to $150^{\circ}C$, $V_{IN} = 12V$ (unless otherwise noted). 4. **Table:** A large table detailing various electrical parameters, test conditions, and values (MIN, TYP, MAX, UNIT). * **SUPPLY CURRENT:** $I_{(VIN)}$, $I_{(VINSDN)}$ * **LOGIC THRESHOLD:** $V_{EN(H)}$, $V_{EN(L)}$, $R_{EN}$ * **$V_{FB}$ VOLTAGE AND DISCHARGE RESISTANCE:** $V_{FB(TH)}$, $I_{(VFB)}$ * **MOSFET:** $R_{DS(on)h}$, $R_{DS(on)l}$ * **CURRENT LIMIT:** $I_{ocl}$ * **THERMAL SHUTDOWN:** $T_{SDN}$ * **OUTPUT UNDERVOLTAGE AND OVERVOLTAGE PROTECTION:** $V_{OVP}$, $V_{UVP}$, $t_{HiccupOn}$, $t_{HiccupOff}$ * **UVLO:** UVLO threshold 5. **Footnote:** (1) Not production tested. 6. **Section 6.6:** Timing Requirements. 7. **Table:** A smaller table detailing timing parameters. * **ON-TIME TIMER CONTROL:** $t_{ON}$, $t_{OFF(MIN)}$ * **SOFT START:** $t_{ss}$ 8. **Footer:** Copyright information, submission feedback link, and product folder links. **Plan:** 1. Create the JSON structure. 2. Fill in the header information. 3. Fill in the section title and condition. 4. Convert the main table into a structured format (markdown or similar). 5. Fill in the footnote. 6. Fill in the second section title. 7. Convert the second table into a structured format. 8. Fill in the footer information. **Detailed Table Extraction:** * **Header:** * Logo: Texas Instruments * Part Numbers: TPS562200, TPS563200 * Document ID: SLVSCBOE – JANUARY 2014 – REVISED MAY 2023 * **Section 6.5:** Electrical Characteristics * **Condition:** $T_J = -40^{\circ}C$ to $150^{\circ}C$, $V_{IN} = 12V$ (unless otherwise noted) * **Table 1:** * Columns: PARAMETER, TEST CONDITIONS, (Model specific columns), MIN, TYP, MAX, UNIT * Rows: * SUPPLY CURRENT (header) * $I_{(VIN)}$ Operating – non-switching supply current | $V_{IN}$ current, $T_A = 25^{\circ}C$, EN = 5V, $V_{FB} = 0.8$ V | TPS562200 | 230 | 330 | $\\mu$A * (same row) | (same condition) | TPS563200 | 190 | 290 | (same unit) * $I_{(VINSDN)}$ Shutdown supply current | $V_{IN}$ current, $T_A = 25^{\circ}C$, EN = 0 V | | 3 | 10 | $\\mu$A * LOGIC THRESHOLD (header) * $V_{EN(H)}$ EN high-level input voltage | EN | | 1.6 | | V * $V_{EN(L)}$ EN low-level input voltage | EN | | | 0.6 | V * $R_{EN}$ EN pin resistance to GND | $V_{EN} = 12$ V | | 225 | 450 | 900 | k$\\Omega$ * $V_{FB}$ VOLTAGE AND DISCHARGE RESISTANCE (header) * $V_{FB(TH)}$ $V_{FB}$ threshold voltage | $T_A = 25^{\circ}C$, $V_O = 1.05$ V, $I_O = 10$ mA, Eco-mode operation | | 772 | | mV * (same row) | $T_A = 25^{\circ}C$, $V_O = 1.05$ V, continuous mode operation | | 758 | 765 | 772 | mV * $I_{(VFB)}$ $V_{FB}$ input current | $V_{FB} = 0.8$V, $T_A = 25^{\circ}C$ | | 0 | $\\pm 0.1$ | $\\mu$A * MOSFET (header) * $R_{DS(on)h}$ High side switch resistance | $T_A = 25^{\circ}C$, $V_{BST} - SW = 5.5$ V | TPS562200 | 122 | | m$\\Omega$ * (same row) | (same condition) | TPS563200 | 68 | | m$\\Omega$ * $R_{DS(on)l}$ Low side switch resistance | $T_A = 25^{\circ}C$ | TPS562200 | 72 | | m$\\Omega$ * (same row) | (same condition) | TPS563200 | 39 | | m$\\Omega$ * CURRENT LIMIT (header) * $I_{ocl}$ Current limit (1) | DC current, $V_{OUT} = 1.05$ V, $L_{OUT} = 2.2$ $\\mu$F | TPS562200 | 2.5 | 3.2 | 4.3 | A * (same row) | DC current, $V_{OUT} = 1.05$ V, $L_{OUT} = 1.5$ $\\mu$F | TPS563200 | 3.5 | 4.2 | 5.3 | A * THERMAL SHUTDOWN (header) * $T_{SDN}$ Thermal shutdown threshold (1) | Shutdown temperature | | 155 | | $^{\circ}C$ * (same row) | Hysteresis | | 35 | | (same unit) * OUTPUT UNDERVOLTAGE AND OVERVOLTAGE PROTECTION (header) * $V_{OVP}$ Output OVP threshold | OVP Detect | | 125% x $V_{fbth}$ | | * $V_{UVP}$ Output Hiccup threshold | Hiccup detect | | 65% x $V_{fbth}$ | | * $t_{HiccupOn}$ Hiccup On Time | Relative to soft-start time | | 1 | | ms * $t_{HiccupOff}$ Hiccup Off Time | Relative to soft-start time | | 7 | | ms * UVLO (header) * UVLO UVLO threshold | Wake up VIN voltage | | 3.45 | 3.75 | 4.05 | V * (same row) | Hysteresis VIN voltage | | 0.13 | 0.32 | 0.55 | (same unit) * **Footnote:** (1) Not production tested * **Section 6.6:** Timing Requirements * **Table 2:** * Columns: (Parameter), (Description), (Condition), MIN, TYP, MAX, UNIT * Rows: * ON-TIME TIMER CONTROL (header) * $t_{ON}$ On time | $V_{IN} = 12$ V, $V_O = 1.05$ V | | 150 | | ns * $t_{OFF(MIN)}$ Minimum off time | $T_A = 25^{\circ}C$, $V_{FB} = 0.5$ V | | 260 | 310 | ns * SOFT START (header) * $t_{ss}$ Soft-start time | Internal soft-start time, $T_A = 25^{\circ}C$ | 0.7 | 1 | 1.3 | ms * **Footer:** * Copyright © 2023 Texas Instruments Incorporated * Submit Document Feedback * 7 * Product Folder Links: TPS562200 TPS563200 I will now format this into the requested JSON structure. I'll use a markdown table for the data tables as it's the most readable and standard way to represent tabular data in this format. One detail to check: The first table has merged cells for "PARAMETER" and "TEST CONDITIONS" headers, and some rows have merged cells for the parameter description. I will represent these as best as possible in markdown. Also, the "UNIT" column for $V_{OVP}$ and $V_{UVP}$ rows seems empty in the image, but logically it should be V. I will leave it empty as per the image. Let's double check the $I_{(VFB)}$ row. $V_{FB}$ input current | $V_{FB} = 0.8$V, $T_A = 25^{\circ}C$ | | 0 | $\\pm 0.1$ | $\\mu$A The "TEST CONDITIONS" column has the condition. The model column is empty. MIN is 0. TYP is $\\pm 0.1$. MAX is empty. UNIT is $\\mu$A. Wait, looking closer at the image, for $I_{(VFB)}$, the value 0 is under MIN, $\\pm 0.1$ is under TYP. There is no MAX value listed. Let's re-verify the $V_{FB(TH)}$ rows. Row 1: $T_A = 25^{\circ}C$, $V_O = 1.05$ V, $I_O = 10$ mA, Eco-mode operation | | 772 | | mV Row 2: $T_A = 25^{\circ}C$, $V_O = 1.05$ V, continuous mode operation | | 758 | 765 | 772 | mV The first row has 772 under TYP. The second row has 758 under MIN, 765 under TYP, 772 under MAX. Okay, I'm ready to generate the JSON. ```json [{"bbox": [85, 34, 247, 80], "category": "header", "text": "TEXAS INSTRUMENTS\nwww.ti.com"}, {"bbox": [637, 56, 913, 81], "category": "header", "text": "TPS562200, TPS563200\nSLVSCBOE – JANUARY 2014 – REVISED MAY 2023"}, {"bbox": [89, 94, 339, 110], "category": "title", "text": "6.5 Electrical Characteristics"}, {"bbox": [89, 117, 465, 131], "category": "text", "text": "$T_J = -40^{\\circ}C$ to $150^{\\circ}C$, $V_{IN} = 12V$ (unless otherwise noted)"}, {"bbox": [89, 130, 907, 732], "category": "table", "text": "<
